message:
test(framework-seam): add manifest centralization and optionality guards

Add two integration tests enforcing that framework dependencies (fastmcp,
fastapi) remain centralized to workspace root and frankenterm-core manifests,
and that frankenterm-core keeps them optional with CLI consuming them only
through feature forwarding. Extract non_comment_lines helper and retrofit
it into the existing import-centralization test to avoid false positives
on commented-out lines. Add collect_named_files and
manifest_has_optional_workspace_dependency helpers.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
